---
title: Fée dans la forêt
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557544/fee_20240228_rmuvas.png
description: Fée dans la forêt
categories: ["children illustration"]
date: 2024-02-28
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557544/fee_20240228_rmuvas.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
